parse.title: Guardian Angel
parse.wikitext:
{{Item info
|goldvalue = 
|goldefficiency = 
|similaritems = Death's Dance;Immortal Shieldbow;Maw of Malmortius;Sterak's Gage
|background = 
|notes = 
* Upon triggering {{sbc|Rebirth}}, all [[summoner spell]]s that are not already on cooldown are placed on a 4-second {{sti|cooldown}}.
* {{sbc|Rebirth}} takes priority over {{cai|Rebirth|Anivia}}, {{cai|Cell Division|Zac}}, and all {{tip|zombie state}} effects but not {{cai|Chronoshift|Zilean}}.
* {{sbc|Rebirth}} does not activate when the user is killed by the {{tip|Nexus Obelisk}}.
* {{sbc|Rebirth's}} health restoration is considered {{tip|healing}} and is increased by effects such as {{iis|Spirit Visage}} {{nie|Boundless Vitality}}, which causes it to restore {{as|{{ap|50*1.25}}% of '''base''' health}} in total.
* While {{sbc|Rebirth}} is in effect, the user's [[health regeneration]] is set to 0.
* [[File: Quicksilver Sash item.png|20px|link=]] {{nie|Quicksilver}} can be used during {{sbc|Rebirth}}.
* {{sbc|Rebirth's}} {{tip|untargetability}} does not {{tip|homing projectile destruction|destroy}} in-flight {{tip|projectiles}}.
== Interactions ==
* The following table refers for interactions while the user is unable to act:
{{ct|attack=false|move=false|cast=false|items=false|consume=false|spells=true,false,false,false,false,false,false|interrupts=death}}
|strategy =

* {{sm2|Guardian Angel passive SFX.ogg}} Passive SFX
|revisions = 
|patchhistory = 
;[[V25.15]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Rebirth protection VFX no longer persists after unequipping the item.

;[[V25.05]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Protection VFX no longer disappears when reconnecting.

;[[V14.2]]
* Combine cost increased to {{g|800}} from {{g|700}}.
** Total cost unchanged.

;[[V14.1]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Steel Sigil}} + {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{g|700}} = {{g|3200}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Chain Vest}} + {{ii|Stopwatch}} + {{g|150}} = {{g|3000}}.
* Attack damage increased to 55 from 45.
* Armor increased to 45 from 40.
* Rebirth mana restoration increased to {{as|100% '''maximum''' mana|mana}} from {{as|30%|mana}}.

;[[V12.17]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|3000}} from {{g|2800}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|150}} from {{g|50}}.
** {{ri|Perfect Timing|Perfectly Timed Stopwatch}} combine cost increased to {{g|650}} from {{g|450}}.
* Attack damage increased to 45 from 40.

;[[V11.20]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Fixed a bug where certain summoner spells could be used while in the resurrecting state.
** Cooldown for summoner spells restored.

;[[V11.19]]
* {{sbc|Undocumented / Bug:}} No longer places summoner spells on cooldown for the duration of the ressurection.

;[[V10.23]]
* Updated icon.
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Chain Vest}} + {{ii|Stopwatch}} + {{g|50}} = {{g|2800}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 40 attack damage, 40 armor.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Rebirth:}} Upon taking lethal damage, {{tip|resurrection|resurrects}} and restores {{as|50% of '''base''' health}} and {{as|30% of '''maximum''' mana}} after 4 seconds of {{tip|stasis}} (300 second cooldown).
** Limited to 1 '''Guardian Angel'''.
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Chain Vest}} + {{ii|Stopwatch}} + {{g|50}} = {{g|2800}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 45 attack damage, 40 armor.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive:}} Upon taking lethal damage, {{tip|resurrection|resurrects}} and restores {{as|50% of '''base''' health}} and {{as|30% of '''maximum''' mana}} after 4 seconds of {{tip|stasis}} (300 second cooldown).

;[[V10.14]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Abilities with damaging auras (e.g. {{cai|Dominus|Renekton}}) no longer continue to damage nearby enemies while the champion is in a revive state.

;[[V10.4]]
* Combined cost reduced to {{g|50}} from {{g|100}}.

;[[V8.11]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Chain Vest}} + {{ii|Stopwatch}} + {{g|100}} = {{g|2800}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Cloth Armor}} + {{ii|Stopwatch}} + {{g|200}} = {{g|2400}}.
* {{sbc|Undocumented:}} Attack damage increased to 45 from 40.
* Armor increased to 40 from 30.

;[[V7.22]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Cloth Armor}} + {{ii|Stopwatch}} + {{g|200}} = {{g|2400}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Cloth Armor}} + {{g|800}} = {{g|2400}}.

;[[V7.11]]
* Item icon updated.

;[[V7.9]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Cloth Armor}} + {{g|800}} = {{g|2400}}
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} + {{ii|Chain Vest}} + {{g|880}} = {{g|2400}}
* Attack damage increased to 40 from 0.
* Armor reduced to 30 from 60.
* Magic resistance reduced to 0 from 45.
* Revive healing changed to {{as|50% of '''base''' health}} from 700 health or {{as|30% '''maximum''' health}}.

;[[V6.9]]
* Combine cost reduced to {{g|880}} from {{g|1180}}.
** Total cost reduced to {{g|2400}} from {{g|2700}}.
* Magic resistance reduced to 45 from 60.

;[[V6.5]]
* Combine cost reduced to {{g|1180}} from {{g|1380}}.
** Total cost reduced to {{g|2700}} from {{g|2900}}.
* Passive now restores either 700 health or {{as|30% of max. health}}, whichever is higher.

;[[V5.22]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|2900}} from {{g|2800}}.
* Armor increased to 60 from 50.
* Magic resistance increased to 60 from 50.

;[[V5.1]]
* Combine cost reduced to {{g|1200}} from {{g|1250}}.
** Total cost reduced to {{g|2800}} from {{g|2850}}.

;[[V4.21]]
* Recipe changed: {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} + {{ii|Chain Vest}} + {{g|1250}} = {{g|2850}}.
* Magic resistance increased to 50 from 40.

;[[V4.20]]
* Recipe changed: {{ii|Null-Magic Mantle}} + {{ii|Chain Vest}} + {{g|1500}} = {{g|2750}}.

;[[V3.10]]
* Recipe changed: {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} + {{ii|Chain Vest}} + {{g|1310}} = {{g|2750}}.
** Total cost increased to {{g|2750}} from {{g|2600}}.
* Magic resist increased to 40 from 30.

;[[V1.0.0.152]]
* Combine cost increased to {{g|1480}} from {{g|1200}}.
* Armor reduced to 50 from 68.
* Magic resistance reduced to 30 from 38.
* Health and mana gained upon reviving changed to 30% of maximum health and mana from 750 health and 375 mana.

;[[V1.0.0.146]]
* Now displays its cooldown on the item itself rather than with a buff.

;[[V1.0.0.118]]
* Added a gray version of the cooldown icon for {{ii|Guardian Angel}}.

;[[V1.0.0.113]]
* Will now always activate after {{ai|Undying Rage|Tryndamere}} and {{ai|Chronoshift|Zilean}} but before {{ai|Rebirth|Anivia}}.

;[[V1.0.0.103]]
* This item now removes most positive buffs from your champion when it activates.
** For example, {{cai|Astral Blessing|Soraka}}, {{cai|Judgment|Garen}}, and {{cai|Crowstorm|Fiddlesticks}} will now be removed.

;[[V1.0.0.100]]
* Now revives champions at 750 health and 375 mana instead of 40% health and mana.

;[[V1.0.0.97]]
* Will now display a timer showing how long until the effect is ready again.

;[[V1.0.0.94(b)]]
* {{ii|Guardian Angel}} will now only proc on cloned units if it was ready to activate when the clone was created. In other words, clones now sync their Guardian Angel states to the main champion when created.
** Clones that expire while being revived with {{ii|Guardian Angel}} will no longer last permanently.

;[[V1.0.0.79]]
* Positive buffs are no longer lost on pseudo-death (ie {{ii|Guardian Angel}}).

;[[V1.0.0.70]]
* Elixirs are no longer lost on pseudo-death (ie {{ii|Guardian Angel}}).

;[[V1.0.0.52]]
* The item had its restoration amount on revival reduced to 40% from 50% of their health and mana.
* You can no longer teleport while being revived by Guardian Angel.

;[[V1.0.0.32]]
* Recipe cost increased to {{g|1200}} from {{g|850}}.
** Total cost increased to {{g|2600}} from {{g|2250}}.

;[[June 26, 2009 Patch]]
* Fixed a bug which caused it to proc more often than once every 5 minutes.

;[[May 15, 2009 Patch]]
* Armor reduced to 75 from 80.
* Magic resist reduced to 40 from 45.
* Fixed a bug where certain item effects would persist past selling the item.
* Fixed a bug which allowed you to respawn an infinite number of times with no cooldown.

;Added
* {{ii|Guardian Angel|variant=old}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Null-Magic Mantle}} + {{ii|Cloth Armor}} + {{ii|Chain Vest}} + {{g|850}} = {{g|2250}}
** +80 Armor
** +45 Magic resist
** {{sbc|Unique - Passive:}} Upon taking lethal damage, restores {{as|50% of '''base''' health}} and {{as|'''maximum''' mana}} after 4 seconds of {{tip|stasis}} (300 second cooldown).
}}
